sentences.target: J'enfile mes bottes pour la pluie.

translations.fr: J'enfile mes bottes pour la pluie.
translations.en: I'm putting on my boots for the rain.
translations.es: Me pongo las botas para la lluvia.
translations.de: Ich ziehe meine Stiefel wegen des Regens an.
translations.it: Mi metto gli stivali per la pioggia.
translations.ru: Я надеваю сапоги на случай дождя.
translations.pt: Estou calçando as botas para a chuva.
translations.vi: Tôi mang ủng để đi mưa.
translations.nl: Ik trek mijn laarzen aan voor de regen.
translations.uk: Я взуваю чоботи на випадок дощу.
translations.hu: Felveszem a csizmáimat az eső miatt.
translations.hi: मैं बारिश के लिए अपने बूट पहन रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Φοράω τις μπότες μου για τη βροχή.
translations.nb: Jeg tar på meg støvlene på grunn av regnet.
translations.id: Aku memakai sepatu bot untuk hujan.
translations.sv: Jag tar på mig stövlarna på grund av regnet.
translations.da: Jeg tager mine støvler på på grund af regnen.
translations.ja: 雨に備えてブーツを履く。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action of putting on.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), plural; modifies 'bottes'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'enfile'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'pluie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Il achète une botte de carottes.

translations.fr: Il achète une botte de carottes.
translations.en: He buys a bunch of carrots.
translations.pt: Ele compra um maço de cenouras.
translations.vi: Anh ấy mua một bó cà rốt.
translations.hi: वह गाजर का एक गुच्छा खरीदता है.
translations.ja: 彼はにんじんを一束買う。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes the action of buying.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'botte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; here denotes a bunch (of carrots); direct object of 'achète'.
Preposition linking the measure noun to its complement.
Common noun, plural; complement of 'de'.

sentences.target: Tes bottes sont encore toutes mouillées.

translations.fr: Tes bottes sont encore toutes mouillées.
translations.en: Your boots are still all wet.
translations.de: Deine Stiefel sind noch ganz nass.
translations.it: I tuoi stivali sono ancora tutti bagnati.
translations.ru: Твои сапоги всё ещё совсем мокрые.
translations.pt: Suas botas ainda estão todas molhadas.
translations.vi: Đôi ủng của bạn vẫn còn ướt hết.
translations.nl: Je laarzen zijn nog helemaal nat.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे बूट अभी भी पूरे गीले हैं.
translations.pl: Twoje buty są nadal zupełnie mokre.
translations.el: Οι μπότες σου είναι ακόμα τελείως βρεγμένες.
translations.nb: Støvlene dine er fortsatt helt våte.
translations.sv: Dina stövlar är fortfarande helt blöta.
translations.ro: Cizmele tale sunt încă complet ude.
translations.cs: Tvé boty jsou pořád úplně mokré.
translations.da: Dine støvler er stadig helt våde.
translations.ja: あなたのブーツはまだびしょ濡れだ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), plural; modifies 'bottes'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the copular clause.
Copular verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adverb meaning 'still'; modifies the predicate.
Adverb 'tout' used as an intensifier; inflected to agree with a following feminine plural adjective; means 'completely'.
Predicate adjective, feminine plural; agrees with 'bottes'.

sentences.target: On cherche une botte perdue dans la neige.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn bɔt pɛʁdy dɑ̃ la nɛʒ/

translations.fr: On cherche une botte perdue dans la neige.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn bɔt pɛʁdy dɑ̃ la nɛʒ/
translations.en: We’re looking for a lost boot in the snow.
translations.es: Buscamos una bota perdida en la nieve.
translations.de: Wir suchen einen verlorenen Stiefel im Schnee.
translations.it: Cerchiamo uno stivale smarrito nella neve.
translations.ko: 눈 속에서 잃어버린 장화를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在雪地里找一只丢失的靴子。
translations.yue: 我哋喺雪地度搵返一隻唔見咗嘅長靴。
translations.ru: Мы ищем потерянный сапог в снегу.
translations.pt: Estamos à procura de uma bota perdida na neve.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một chiếc ủng bị mất trong tuyết.
translations.ar: نبحث عن جزمة ضائعة في الثلج.
translations.nl: We zoeken een verloren laars in de sneeuw.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо загублений чобіт у снігу.
translations.hu: Egy elveszett csizmát keresünk a hóban.
translations.hi: हम बर्फ में खोया हुआ एक बूट ढूँढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουμε μια χαμένη μπότα στο χιόνι.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en mistet støvel i snøen.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari sebuah sepatu bot yang hilang di salju.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en förlorad stövel i snön.
translations.ro: Căutăm o cizmă pierdută în zăpadă.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en forsvundet støvle i sneen.
translations.ja: 雪の中でなくしたブーツを探している。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often 'we' in colloquial French); syntactic 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; denotes the action of searching.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'botte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adjectival past participle, feminine singular; modifies 'botte' meaning 'lost'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'neige'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
